Title: Verify the description of the functionalities of the system
Preconditions: User has access to the project document
Test Steps: 1. Read the text on page 5 of the document.
Expected Result: The text should provide a brief overview of the main functionalities of the U-NvIroment system.

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: The application is installed and active.
Test Data: New user details (name, email, phone number, password).
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the registration screen.
3. Enter the new user details in the registration form.
4. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: A new user account is created and the user can access the application with the registered details.

Title: User Login
Preconditions: The user has an account in the application.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. Navigate to the login screen.
3. Enter the user credentials in the login form.
4. Click on the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access the application with the provided credentials.

Title: Create Announcement
Preconditions: User has logged in to their profile
Test Steps:
1. Press the appropriate icon to create a new announcement
2. Enter the announcement data
3. Save the announcement
Expected Result: The announcement is saved and is available for viewing in the app

Title: Modify Announcement
Preconditions: User has logged in to their profile and has created an announcement
Test Steps:
1. Click on the icon next to the existing announcement
2. Modify the announcement data
3. Save the modified announcement

Title: View User Profile
Test Steps:
1. Log in to the application.
2. Navigate to the user profile page.
Expected Result:
The user can view their profile details.
Note: The PDF does not provide enough information to create more test cases. The above test cases are based on the explicit requirements provided in the PDF. If more requirements are added in the future, additional test cases can be created accordingly.

Title: Modify Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile section
2. Select the "Edit Profile" option
3. Update the user information
4. Save the changes
Expected Result: The user information is updated as per the changes made

Title: Create Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement creation section
2. Enter the announcement details
3. Save the announcement
Expected Result: The announcement is created and visible to other users

Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User does not have an account
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Click on the "Register" button
3. Enter the required personal information
4. Click on the "Submit" button
Expected Result: The user is able to create an account and navigate within the application.

Title: Personal Chats among Users
Preconditions: Both users have registered and are logged in
Test Data: Messages to be sent between users
Test Steps:
1. User A logs in to the application
2. User A navigates to the chat section
3. User A selects User B to start a chat
4. User A sends a message to User B
5. User B receives the message and replies
Expected Result: The message is successfully sent and received between the two users.

Title: Classification System
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User logs in to the application
2. User navigates to the post section
3. User selects a post to classify
4. User chooses a classification category
5. The post is successfully classified
Expected Result: The post is successfully classified and can be easily found by other users within the chosen category.

Title: Sharing a Post
Preconditions: User has registered and is logged in
Test Steps:
1. User logs in to the application
2. User navigates to the post section
3. User selects a post to share
4. User chooses the sharing option
5. The post is successfully shared with the selected users
Expected Result: The post is successfully shared with the selected users.
